title: Rights of Man
description: A Wikisource source card for Rights of Man by Thomas Paine.

pages.text: Rights of Man is a public-domain political text for studying revolution, government, rights, inequality, and Enlightenment-era argument.
Use this source for guided excerpts, comparing political philosophies, tracking abstract vocabulary, and analyzing how authors build arguments.
Wikisource texts may include edition-specific notes. Check the linked work page for license and source information before importing selections.
